description_long: This chest of drawers features a modern, minimalist design with a light wood grain finish and clean, straight lines. The front side displays two spacious drawers, each equipped with a simple round black knob handle, providing easy access to storage. The sides and top are finished in the same light wood texture, giving the piece a cohesive and natural appearance. The back and side panels are plain, with no additional features or embellishments, emphasizing the utilitarian style. The drawers are likely constructed with a wood composite or MDF core, and the handles appear to be made of metal or plastic. This piece would fit well in urban environments such as apartment entryways, garages, or sidewalk furniture setups.
description: A light wood grain chest of drawers with two drawers and round black knob handles, featuring a minimalist and modern design. The piece is simple, functional, and visually cohesive.
description_view_0: The side view shows the plain wood grain panel with no visible handles or drawers, highlighting the thickness of the top surface.
description_view_1: Another side view, similar to view 0, displaying the uninterrupted wood grain panel and the overhanging top.
description_view_2: The front view reveals two drawers with round black knob handles, clearly showing the storage function of the chest.
description_view_3: The opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with a plain wood grain panel and no visible hardware.
